title: Coordination Method Output Contract v0.1
description: One timestep output from any coordination method (centralized, hierarchical, market, gossip, swarm, LLM, MARL). Enables comparable telemetry and strict interface for method plug-ins.

method_id.description: Registry method identifier (e.g. centralized_planner, market_auction, llm_constrained)

actions.description: Per-agent actions; each item has agent_id and action payload

view_age_ms.description: Max or mean view age in ms (staleness) for this step

plan_time_ms.description: Planning or decision time in ms if measured

invariants_considered.description: Invariant IDs considered in this step (e.g. INV-COC-001)

safety_shield_applied.description: Whether a safety shield (e.g. simplex) overrode or corrected actions

safety_shield_details.description: Optional details: overrides count, reason codes, etc.
